query_family_examples: odds for England in world cup

steps.purpose: Walk from any one known team's market slug to the parent event and back to every sibling team market. Returns yesProbability + yesPercent + endDate for each.
steps.failure_modes: If the seed slug 404s (event resolved/expired), retry with another known team in the same event. /public-search is unreliable for multi-outcome hub topics — do not fall back to it.

steps.purpose: Find the sibling whose .question or .title contains $TEAM (case-insensitive whole word). The siblings array is the .markets field of the response.
OPTIONAL cross-venue check: surface Kalshi's same-team market alongside the Polymarket sibling so the agent can report any divergence (Kalshi tickers under KXMENWORLDCUP-26-<TEAM_ABBREV>).
steps.failure_modes: compare returns empty when pairing confidence is low; in that case fall back to `kalshi events get KXMENWORLDCUP-26 --with-markets --agent` and filter children by yes_sub_title.
